rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added data_flow edge from b3 (assignment) to b5 (assignment) to connect its computation result to a downstream usage.
Added data_flow edge from b5 (assignment) to b8 (control) to connect its computation result to a downstream usage.
Added data_flow edge from b7 (call) to b5 (assignment) to connect its return value to its containing assignment node.
Added control_flow edge from b8 (control) to b1 (function) to ensure the control flow path terminates correctly within the function.
